raw_text: I still haven't seen how the layout looks. I'm really excited for it. Also, for the guys who didn't notice, we've updated some of the models and we have colors and a new camera setup. Hopefully we're going to be testing it out in the weeks to come for camera angles and stuff. Things might shift as it happens, but the color scheme on each of the characters' bases corresponds to their portrait color, so it should be easier to distinguish who is who on the battle mat going forward, so hopefully that'll be helpful. All right! Let's get into the thick of it. So last we left off, Vox Machina had fin

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: We got to get Grog on a side quest for 826LA.

preceding.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding.text: You're very impotent to me.

preceding.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding.text: Don't make it too hard.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: (rimshot) All righty, so. While we wait for Sam to arrive, let's go ahead and get into the game--

preceding.speaker: LAURA
preceding.text: Oh my gosh, it's so pretty! The panels behind us. I was just admiring--

raw_text: A few hours, two hours, let's say. It's four, five o'clock in the afternoon.

preceding.speaker: MARY
preceding.text: Yes. Let's get a break.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: After a brief time of coffee and a bit of sobering, you find yourselves of sound enough mind.

preceding.speaker: LIAM
preceding.text: 17 hours later?! (laughter)

preceding.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding.text: Coffee, coffee.

preceding.speaker: MARY
preceding.text: I metabolize things very quickly, you'd be surprised.

raw_text: Right, right. But even so, even though you slept, it hasn't been very restful. It's been technically enough to rest, but your evening has been fraught with nightmares. Perpetually. But your Pepperbox is repaired, and does cost you half the cost of the weapon cost to repair.

preceding.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding.text: Half cost. Oh my god, that's awful. Okay, tinkering check. 12.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: 12. Okay.

preceding.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding.text: Technically, that would be a success.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: Yeah. So you take the rest of the morning, unsleeping, the dark bags under your eyes. You manage to get the Pepperbox back in working order.

preceding.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding.text: Oh, I was asleep. I wasn't with them, so I just woke up really early.

raw_text: So as the drinks continue to flow, you guys swap stories, you converse. The evening is drawing closer to like the 1:30-2:00 in the morning, at this point. Most of the other patrons have filtered out of the bar. The Heroes' Feast, after finishing being consumed, itself has reverted back down to the wooden domino, which is a different enchantment to what you're used to. Your more druidic, divine-based Heroes' Feast you summon out of the actual element. This is almost an implement or a focus he uses for the spell each time. It's a different way of getting the same effect. Interesting to you, not

preceding.speaker: SAM
preceding.text: She's had one drink.

preceding.speaker: MARISHA
preceding.text: This is great.

preceding.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding.text: When do we tell her that's a Shirley Temple? (laughter)

preceding.speaker: MARISHA
preceding.text: Look, it's been fermenting for a while.

preceding.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding.text: So hammered off this cherry juice, you guys. (laughs)

raw_text: All right, so the sun has come up, the hour hits to eight, nine in the morning, you're looking at about three hours until the dragon's--

preceding.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding.text: It never works!

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: So, as you call to Sarenrae, the boundaries and barriers that keep the gods from directly interfering with this realm are particularly strong this morning. While you feel her glow upon you, her warmth

preceding.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding.text: Dammit. I don't feel her warmth, though.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: What else would you like to do?

preceding.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding.text: Just go eat.

raw_text: Yeah, one year later. So we'll talk and converse individually and as a group about what you guys want to accomplish over the next year without the constant threat of perpetual death. And we'll see where that takes us in two weeks for the story of Vox Machina into the final arc of your story. And return next week for the awesome one-shot. I'm super excited. I've never been able to play with most of you guys at all.

preceding.speaker: SAM
preceding.text: Is Conan coming? Is Conan O'Brien--

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: Conan O'Brien? Yeah, he seems to be available, I'm pretty sure, he's not doing much. We'll get him and Colbert to guest.

preceding.speaker: LAURA
preceding.text: Oh my gosh!

preceding.speaker: SAM
preceding.text: Welcome back, Ashley! Now you have to wait a year to play again.

preceding.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding.text: One year later, huh?

raw_text: Okay. I'll let it happen. Usually, you attune one item in a short rest.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: Welcome back, everyone. We've had a little break here. A quick announcement for you guys, the rebroadcast tonight will be delayed for about 30 minutes as we have to shoot something directly after this

preceding.speaker: SAM
preceding.text: I don't know what that means.

preceding.speaker: LIAM
preceding.text: We'll find out. I'd like to re-attune to the Cloak of Displacement. And the Boots of Haste, are they spent for the day for anybody? If I were to wear them, could I get the juice or no? They're done?

preceding.speaker: LAURA
preceding.text: They're too big for you, teeny.

preceding.speaker: LIAM
preceding.text: They would shrink to me. I'm going to re-attune my Keen Dagger, then, for the moment. So it's Deathwalkers Ward, Keen Dagger, Cloak. Three items.

raw_text: It's very cold, but sleep does take you. You guys finish your evening's rest. You awake. After the stress of the previous battle of the day, you all tend to sleep in for the most part, plus the late hour of eventually getting to rest. You all eventually come to later in the morning, closer to noon, but as you wake up, you wake up to the smell of food being cooked. You make your way out into the central foyer area of the estate, and you can see Berthold is running around the kitchen, desperately trying to put together whatever meal is viable, and eventually shouts out, "Breakfast is served!"

preceding.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding.text: You turn around three times.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: That's how rock gnomes sleep, they do a little circle around the cushion.

preceding.speaker: LIAM
preceding.text: I just turn into Macklemore.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: All right. So you make it to your room, left as it was. Most of the furniture is covered in sheets, but untouched as to where you left it the last time you were here. There's a firm layer of dust acro

preceding.speaker: SAM
preceding.text: I'll cuddle with the Doty arm.

raw_text: As you all rest, a long rest at sea, as the Squalleater and The Mistake make their way towards Darktow to the far west, we'll end tonight's game there and pick up there next week.

preceding.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding.text: Caduceus.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: One eye slowly opens as you are keen to be somewhat aware-- living alone, out in the dangerous wood-- to any sort of aberrant noise in the vicinity. You hear the faint creak of very gentle footsteps a

preceding.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding.text: Can I figure out what happened just by looking at him?

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: You? Yeah. (giggling)

preceding.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding.text: Sleep well with your bad decisions.

raw_text: By the way, the buzz, if you will, the rush slowly begins to fade over the next minute or so. Taryon finishes his Identification and goes, "Huh. Apparently these are receptacles to contain a fragment of refined soul."

preceding.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding.text: That's actually true.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: That is actually true. (laughs)

preceding.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding.text: I'm going to gently pop her in the ankle to see if I can get her to just fall onto the bed and stop hopping.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: (falling and slamming noise) Percy just knocks you onto your ass.

preceding.speaker: LAURA
preceding.text: Okay, Keyleth, okay.

raw_text: Takes about an hour or so, but you manage to pull from the surroundings these really nice, thick spider silk hammocks, that should be able to support your respective weights. Grog is the only one that might be questionable with the sheer amount of weight that is his form.

preceding.speaker: SAM
preceding.text: What if we fall out?

preceding.speaker: MARISHA
preceding.text: I Druidcraft some spiderweb hammocks.

preceding.speaker: LAURA
preceding.text: Ooh.

preceding.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding.text: Sticky.

preceding.speaker: MARISHA
preceding.text: And, as usual, light some sage.

raw_text: Yes. I would like you both, currently about an hour's journey past that intersection with the other caravan, to make a perception check.

preceding.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding.text: So generous of you.

preceding.speaker: LAURA
preceding.text: You want to do it?

preceding.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding.text: I was going to say, yeah. I'll take a round. I'm used to keeping an eye out on the road.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: So the two of you are taking point up until you guys decide to change it when it comes to travel along the road.

preceding.speaker: MARISHA
preceding.text: It's just general perception?

raw_text: So. As you grab her and you both begin to transport outside of the cage, you feel the force of it push back, but the nature of your innate magical ability manages to puncture through that threshold and then both of you reappear at the opposite side, no worse for wear. The cage is still present, though, and it's now blocking the path across. The rest of you get across fine. It's the gnomes that got stuck, and now the two of you are on the opposite end. You have 30 feet between you and the opposite side, and that walkway is entirely closed off.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: It is.

preceding.speaker: SAM
preceding.text: Okay. 20.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: 20? 20 will do it.

preceding.speaker: SAM
preceding.text: I've never had to make a charisma saving throw before.

preceding.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding.text: You got very high.

raw_text: Okay. It's the strangest wall you've constructed, as up in the air on the ship that is mostly constructed out of iron and metal, there is little to no stone available of which you can sprout a Wall of Stone. However, there are weights set up on top, so what you create is less of a smooth Wall of Stone and more of a very thin, brittle shale wall that may function for the time being, but probably won't stand up for more than five to ten minutes.

preceding.speaker: LAURA
preceding.text: His tiny mind is exactly proportionate for the rest of his body, Tiberius.

preceding.speaker: SAM
preceding.text: Well, not the entire body.

preceding.text: I'm going to walk up to the hull and be like--

preceding.speaker: ORION
preceding.text: Oh. (clears throat)

raw_text: Nope, the rest of you are out. It's one round before it seems to be-- it's currently sitting up in the sarcophagus, its arms reaching out for the hammer at its side.

preceding.speaker: MATT
preceding.text: Okay. As she holds up the holy symbol, the might of Sarenrae swells within her and blasts forth in a shockwave of divine energy and will. What's her DC?

preceding.text: Wisdom saving throw DC, oh shit, so many pieces of paper. 18.
